feedback: I'm guessing that you wanted me to assume that if Red took the fruit that Green wanted  it meant either that Red didn't like Green  or that (if done in front of Purple)  Red wanted Purple to think that he didn't like Green.  This seems like a silly way to put it.  Shouldn't it be something more like  Is Red a nice person?" or "Does Red want Purple to think he's a nice person?"  Why are we assuming that Red doesn't like Green?  I was tempted to make all of my answers neutral simply because I wasn't willing to assume anything about Red's personal feelings about Green.  Just my two cents' worth.  I only have an English degree and a Masters in Education  not a psychology degree  so what do I know? "
